title: Recipe front matter
description: Contract for the YAML front matter of every recipes/*.md file.

slug.description: URL-safe id; defaults to the filename stem.

servings.description: Optional yield (e.g. '6 people'). Omit when the source gives no quantity.

credits.description: Recipe source / attribution shown in the footer. Optional — omit when there's no named source.

page.description: Optional provenance: source notebook/book page number (e.g. 'p. 42').

attribution.description: Optional 'Based on a recipe by …' line.

story.description: Optional narrative. When non-empty, the recipe gets a full story page; otherwise a compact opener.

headshot.description: Optional path to a portrait; rendered as a circular crop on the story page.

illustration.description: Path to the hero food illustration (placeholder accepted).

license.description: Per-recipe content license; inherits book.yaml content_license when omitted.
